# Restwell Retreats
> Accessible holiday accommodation in Whitstable, Kent

## Main pages
- `Homepage -> https://restwellretreats.co.uk/`: Accessible self-catering bungalow
- `The Property -> /the-property/`: Full accessibility specification
- `Who It's For -> /who-its-for/`: Guests, families, carers, professionals
- `How It Works -> /how-it-works/`: Booking process
- `Accessibility -> /accessibility/`: Detailed access statement
- `FAQ -> /faq/`: Common questions

## Social profiles
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/restwellretreats/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/restwellretreats
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/restwell-retreats

## Key facts
- Location: Whitstable, Kent, UK
- Type: Wheelchair-accessible single-storey bungalow
- Features: Ceiling hoist, profiling bed, wet room
- Booking: Whole-property private rental
- Care: Optional CQC-regulated support via Continuity of Care Services
